title: capnoides schanginii
intro: Capnoides schanginii, also known as Schangin's capnoides, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. The medicinal properties of Capnoides schanginii are attributed to its essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. This plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Capnoides schanginii is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
